query:
SELECT id, title_ar
FROM lessons 
WHERE content_markdown LIKE '%](/ lesson-%'
ORDER BY id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user Bk7aCGrDyRKGN1q.root --database T3XiKgmnDLqJNf6z2vN3GW --execute SELECT id, title_ar
FROM lessons 
WHERE content_markdown LIKE '%](/ lesson-%'
ORDER BY id;
